challenges.title: 未来计划与意图 (Be Going To)

questions.prompt: "be going to" 主要用来表达什么？
options: A. 已经发生的动作
B. 正在发生的动作
C. 未来已经决定或有计划的动作
D. 过去的习惯
questions.explanation: "be going to" 通常用于表达未来已经决定、有计划或有强烈意图的动作。
questions.hint: 想想"I'm going to get up and have breakfast"表达的是什么。

questions.prompt: "be going to" 的正确结构是什么？
options: A. 主语 + going to + 动词原形
B. 主语 + be + going to + 动词原形
C. 主语 + be + go to + 动词原形
D. 主语 + am/is/are + going to + 动词-ing
questions.explanation: "be going to" 的正确结构是主语 + be动词（am/is/are）+ going to + 动词原形。

questions.prompt: 将句子 "She is going to eat lunch." 改为否定句。
options: A. She isn't going to eat lunch.
B. She going to not eat lunch.
C. She doesn't going to eat lunch.
D. She will not going to eat lunch.
questions.explanation: 否定句的形成是在be动词后加not，即 "主语 + be动词 + not + going to + 动词原形"。

questions.prompt: 如果要问“你们什么时候去公园？”，正确的问句是：
options: A. What time are you going to the park?
B. When are you going to the park?
C. When you are going to the park?
D. Are you going to the park when?
questions.explanation: 疑问句的结构是 疑问词 + be动词 + 主语 + going to + 动词原形？"What time"是问具体时间点，"When"是问什么时候，更符合语境。

questions.prompt: 填空: "I ___ going to get up and have breakfast."
options: A. am
B. is
C. are
D. be
questions.explanation: 主语 "I" 后面跟 "am"。

questions.prompt: 填空: "You ___ going to have lunch!"
options: A. am
B. is
C. are
D. be
questions.explanation: 主语 "You" 后面跟 "are"。

questions.prompt: 哪一句是正确的？
options: A. They going to play football.
B. They are go to play football.
C. They are going to play football.
D. They is going to play football.
questions.explanation: 正确的结构是 "主语 + are + going to + 动词原形"。选项 A 缺少be动词，选项 B "go" 没有变成 "going"，选项 D "They" 应该搭配 "are"。

questions.prompt: 哪句话表达了基于当前迹象的预测？
options: A. I think it will rain tomorrow.
B. It's going to rain soon. (看到乌云)
C. I will help you with your homework.
D. She is going to be a doctor someday.
questions.explanation: "It's going to rain soon." 在看到乌云时使用，表达基于当前证据的预测。"She is going to be a doctor someday"是计划/意图，A是普遍预测，C是即时决定。
questions.hint: 语境中提到“dark clouds”暗示了什么？

questions.prompt: "When are we going to eat?" 这个问句主要询问什么？
options: A. 吃饭的地点
B. 吃饭的方式
C. 吃饭的时间
D. 吃饭的原因
questions.explanation: "When" 疑问词专门用于询问时间。

questions.prompt: "My sister ___ going to visit her friend this weekend."
options: A. are
B. is
C. am
D. be
questions.explanation: 主语 "My sister" 是单数第三人称，因此be动词用 "is"。

questions.prompt: 在表达天气预报时，我们通常使用 "will" 来表示什么？
options: A. 已经发生的事实
B. 计划好的未来事件
C. 对未来的预测或可能性
D. 正在进行中的动作
questions.explanation: "will" 在天气预报中通常用来表达对未来天气的预测或可能性。
questions.hint: 课文中“It will snow in Harbin.”表达的是什么。

questions.prompt: 动词 "will" 的正确结构是：
options: A. 主语 + will + 动词-ing
B. 主语 + will + 动词的过去式
C. 主语 + will + 动词原形
D. 主语 + will + be + 动词原形
questions.explanation: "will" 后面直接跟动词原形。

questions.prompt: 将句子 "It will rain tomorrow." 改为否定句。
options: A. It will not rain tomorrow.
B. It not will rain tomorrow.
C. It won't be rain tomorrow.
D. It isn't will rain tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 否定句的形成是在 "will" 后面加 "not"，可以缩写为 "won't"。

questions.prompt: 如果要询问“明天会下雪吗？”，正确的问句是：
options: A. Will it snow tomorrow?
B. It will snow tomorrow?
C. Does it will snow tomorrow?
D. Will snow it tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 疑问句的结构是 "Will + 主语 + 动词原形？"。

questions.prompt: 填空: "It ___ snow in Harbin."
options: A. is
B. will
C. are
D. be going to
questions.explanation: "will" 用于天气预报的预测。
questions.hint: 课文中天气预报的句式。

questions.prompt: 填空: "I think it ___ be sunny in Sanya tomorrow."
options: A. is
B. will
C. going to
D. was
questions.explanation: "I think..." 后面通常接 "will" 来表达对未来的猜测或预测。

questions.prompt: 哪一句是正确的？
options: A. It will sunny.
B. It will be sunny.
C. It will is sunny.
D. It will to be sunny.
questions.explanation: 当 "will" 后面跟形容词 "sunny" 时，需要加上动词原形 "be"。
questions.hint: "will" 后面接动词原形，"sunny" 是形容词。

questions.prompt: "It's going to rain" 和 "It will rain" 这两句话在使用上有什么主要区别（根据课文语境）？
options: A. 前者表示过去的动作，后者表示未来的动作。
B. 前者基于现有证据的预测，后者是普遍的预测或预报。
C. 前者表示计划，后者表示意图。
D. 它们之间没有区别。
questions.explanation: 根据课文语境，"It's going to rain" 在看到乌云时使用（有证据），而 "It will rain" 是天气预报（普遍预测）。
questions.hint: 结合Simon的妈妈和Daming对天气的对话。

questions.prompt: 如果你想表达“明天西安会很冷而且有风”，以下哪种表达最恰当？
options: A. It is going to be cold and windy in Xi'an tomorrow.
B. It will be cold and windy in Xi'an tomorrow.
C. It was cold and windy in Xi'an tomorrow.
D. It has been cold and windy in Xi'an tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 描述天气预报时，"will" 是最常用的。虽然 "be going to" 也能用于预测，但对于这种一般性的天气预报，"will" 更常见和自然。
questions.hint: 课文中天气预报的表达方式。

questions.prompt: "They will come to the party." 的缩写形式是：
options: A. They'll come to the party.
B. They're will come to the party.
C. They will'd come to the party.
D. They come'll to the party.
questions.explanation: "will" 的缩写形式是 "'ll"，与主语结合。
